Meaning.En: A circular object that rotates on an axle and is used for transportation or machinery.
Meaning.Example: The car stopped because one of the wheels was flat.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả một chiếc xe đang di chuyển hoặc bị hỏng do lốp xẹp.
Situation.En: A scenario involving vehicle movement or mechanical failure related to tires.

Situation.Vi: Hướng dẫn cách thay lốp xe khi bị xịt.
Situation.En: A step-by-step guide for changing a car tire after a puncture.

Meaning.En: To move or cause something to move quickly, often with a spinning motion; to rotate rapidly.
Meaning.Example: He wheeled the suitcase through the airport.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả việc di chuyển vali có bánh xe trong sân bay.
Situation.En: Describing the act of rolling a wheeled suitcase through an airport terminal.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả một người quay nhanh trong khi khiêu vũ.
Situation.En: Describing someone spinning quickly during a dance move.
